hero.headline: Bangladesh's Trusted Hardware Wholesale Marketplace
hero.subtitle: Buy hardware products at the best wholesale prices from verified sellers. Transparent pricing, easy ordering, secure transactions.

verified.title: Verified Sellers
verified.desc: Every seller is verified by us. Ensure seller trustworthiness through KYC and trade license verification.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.desc: All wholesale prices are displayed clearly. No hidden costs. See tiered pricing based on quantity.

easy.title: Easy Ordering
easy.desc: Order easily from your mobile. Browse products, compare, and place orders in just a few steps.

secure.title: Secure Transactions
secure.desc: Your payments are protected. Enjoy Cash on Delivery and digital payment options with complete security.

step1.title: Register
step1.desc: Quickly create an account using your mobile number with OTP verification.

step2.title: Browse Products
step2.desc: Browse by category, compare prices, and find the best sellers.

step3.title: Place Order
step3.desc: Order at wholesale prices and get delivery directly to your shop.
